title: The History of Don Quixote, Volume 2, Part 20
summaries: "The History of Don Quixote, Volume 2, Part 20" by Miguel de Cervantes Saavedra is part of a novel originally published in two parts in 1605 and 1615. The story follows Alonso Quijano, a minor nobleman who loses his sanity from reading too many chivalric romances and reinvents himself as the knight-errant Don Quixote. Accompanied by his squire Sancho Panza, he embarks on adventures where fantasy collides with reality, mistaking windmills for giants and inns for castles in his quest to revive chivalry. (This is an automatically generated summary.)
subjects: Spain -- Social life and customs -- 16th century -- Fiction
